name: Carol's Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon salt per quart of boiling water
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and drain off the fat.
2. Heat the onions without browning them; stir in the remaining sauce ingredients. Simmer for about 30 minutes.
3. Fill a very large pot with water and add about 1 teaspoon of salt per quart of water. Add the lasagna noodles. Cook enough noodles to cover a 13x9 baking pan six layers deep. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
4. Grease the inside of the baking pan with light vegetable oil.
5. Make three filling layers. For each layer, place one-third of the noodles in two layers. Spread one-third of the ricotta mixture over the noodles. Sprinkle with one-third of the mozzarella cheese. Top with one-third of the sauce.
6. Bake uncovered for 40-45 minutes or until bubbly and hot. Let sit for 5-10 minutes before serving.
NOTES:
A hearty lasagna with lots of meat and cheese -- Carol Angell and Juan Ocha are old friends from Tektronix. Her lasagna recipe is one of my favorites.
Yield: Serves 8-12
Difficulty: Moderate
Time: 30 minutes preparation, 45 minutes baking, 10 minutes cooling
Precision: Approximate measurements are acceptable
